The addresses are in `.data.rel.ro` - data with relocations that's read-only after relocation. The computed goto table would contain addresses that resolve to code within the `.text` section at runtime, but the tombstone PC values are pointing to the data entries themselves rather than the resolved targets. This makes the stack unwinding a bit confusing for the SGen worker thread, but for reporting purposes I'll note that the addresses resolve to the interpreter dispatch table in interp.c.
